scope: Independent audit of plan-041 Memory Index implementation
rationale: opencode --pure deepseek independent audit passed for plan-041; post-close verification ver-543729974fde is passing and fresh, and the low findings remain future-scope suggestions rather than blockers.

findings.finding: Memory search superseded_by is not filterable
findings.evidence: opencode audit: search_memory filters status, tag, related plan/audit/drift but not superseded_by; plan only requires status and relationship filtering/exposure
findings.recommendation: Consider adding --superseded-by filter in a future slice if agents need direct supersession queries

findings.finding: Quality signal first_seen/last_seen remain future scope
findings.evidence: docs/architecture/quality-signals.md lists first_seen/last_seen; MemoryRecord uses created_at/updated_at and docs allow partial fields for existing objects
findings.recommendation: Accept as scope boundary; add first_seen/last_seen when health aggregation materializes
